title: Wide Open West - WOW! ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] Wide Open West (WOW!) is the sixth largest cable operator in the United States. It provides telecommunications, broadband, and cable television services. Its portfolio includes high-speed internet, data, voice, cloud services, and cable television. Operating mainly in the Midwest and Southeast, WOW! is recognized for exceptional service and nationally ranked for customer satisfaction.
